headline: DTE Energy (DTE) Appoints Renee Tomina To Lead DTE Gas After Robert Richard Retires
summary: DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) has appointed Renee Tomina as president and COO of DTE Gas. The leadership change follows the retirement of long serving executive Robert Richard. DTE Gas serves about 1.4 million customers and is overseeing a major natural gas infrastructure modernization across Michigan. DTE Energy, through its DTE Gas subsidiary, plays a central role in providing natural gas service to homes and businesses across Michigan while managing a large scale infrastructure upgrade program...

headline: DTE Energy names Renee Tomina president and chief operating officer of DTE Gas
summary: DTE Energy (NYSE: DTE) today announced that Renee Tomina, senior vice president, Project Management Office, will become president and chief operating officer of DTE Gas, effective June 29. She succeeds Robert Richard, who is retiring after a distinguished 40-year career, including 23 years at DTE.
